<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; use Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Cloner\Stub; /** * Represents the main properties of a PHP variable, pre-casted by a caster. * * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> */ class CutStub extends Stub { public function __construct(mixed $value) { $this->value = $value; switch (\gettype($value)) { case 'object': $this->type = self::TYPE_OBJECT; $this->class = get_debug_type($value); if ($value instanceof \Closure) { ReflectionCaster::castClosure($value, [], $this, true, Caster::EXCLUDE_VERBOSE); } $this->cut = -1; break; case 'array': $this->type = self::TYPE_ARRAY; $this->class = self::ARRAY_ASSOC; $this->cut = $this->value = \count($value); break; case 'resource': case 'unknown type': case 'resource (closed)': $this->type = self::TYPE_RESOURCE; $this->handle = (int) $value; if ('Unknown' === $this->class = @get_resource_type($value)) { $this->class = 'Closed'; } $this->cut = -1; break; case 'string': $this->type = self::TYPE_STRING; $this->class = preg_match('//u', $value) ? self::STRING_UTF8 : self::STRING_BINARY; $this->cut = self::STRING_BINARY === $this->class ? \strlen($value) : mb_strlen($value, 'UTF-8'); $this->value = ''; break; } } }
